entry.title: LMS SF User Connector filter by Department
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have multiple business units in BizX and 1 business unit or Department wants to use LMS. If we were to configure the SF User Connector, is it possible to filter out only the department users I specify? I guess we can use the Integration Center, but want to know if this is possible with the standard SF User connector. 

TIA

entry.title: PowerDesigner Web Portal using JDBC to connect to repository on SQL Server
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone have experience implementing Web Portal with repository on SQL server via JDBC?   How does it work?   Did you have to use local SQL Server account?   Did you have to save username and password in repository xml?    Is there a way to use externally managed (domain) accounts and not saving username/password?   How?

Thank you!

entry.title: PCR for OT calculations
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can someone help me writing a time PCR based on the below logic.

weekly schedule 3 working days and 4 day offs.

If the EE works any hours on day offs their hours should be calculated as 1,5x or 2.0x based on union agreement as below

If EE works upto 8 hours it should be 1.5x overtime

If EE works from 9 hours to 16 hours it should be 2.0x overtime

if EE works from 17 or more it should be 1.5x overtime,

entry.title: Ways to send data between ibp and bw4hana when using integration suite with cpi-ds
entry.content:
Hello fellow integrators!!!

Just looking out for a approach on an integration scenario for data flow from IBP system to cpi-ds to integration suite and then go bw4hana

 

 

The question is what are the ways to send data ( using file or  http protocol) and their limitations in general.

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract Settlement error: Tax code via pri...
entry.content:
Hi @anshuljoshi 

Delta accruals are not relevant for tax. Hence, you are not getting the error during delta accrual settlement creation. During the Rebate settlement for the Goods related Contract type, Tax code will be copied from the source documents from the business volume. This happens from the RETT condition type. If tax code is missing in business volume (this happens for of ECC documents transferred to S4 in case of Bulefield or brownfield implementation) then tax code is determined by AS01 condition type. Check if you have these two condition types in the Calculation Schema. If you want to suppress this error, you can do so in the Settlement Process type. "Handling of Missing Tax Code" field controls how to handle when the tax code is missing in the settlement document. Hope this help.

Regards

Hari

entry.title: Re: Integration Advisor - TPM Agreement: Handle Single So...
entry.content:
We addressed this issue by using a custom TPM mapping. Specifically, we checked the BGM D_1001 value for 220 or 81. This approach also proved useful when we needed to include 105 for Purchase Orders.

The output structure doesn’t have to be ORDERS05—in the case of Purchase Orders, we used PORDCR103. As long as the target IDoc payload is correctly structured, the specific output format doesn’t matter.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Melbourne 19th Feb 2025
entry.content: Who all can join ?

entry.title: Re: WB2R_SC - Settlement document that reduces business v...
entry.content:
Hi @marco19 

If I understood your requirement correctly, credit memo has to reduce the accruals (post negative accruals). 

In standard, Credit memos post the negative accruals for the value based (%) condition contracts. For the quantity-based rebate calculation this will not happen. This makes sense as there is no quantity transaction (there is no goods movement) for the credit memos. If you still need to proceed with the requirement, follow the instructions in OSS Note: 3433878 - Some fields are not updated in the business volume table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1

Regards

Hari

entry.title: Re: How to create the default User Control and Superdba o...

Hi,

Were you able to push data from SAP Datasphere using Generic Odata connection? I am also trying to push the data to S4Hana system from SAP BTP datasphere. Kindly confirm. 🙂

entry.title: How to send email reminders before the due date of the invoice
entry.content:
We are currently utilizing dunning and dunning runs for past due invoices. We are wondering if its possible to send email reminders before the due date of the invoice. Say 15 days before the invoice is actually due. Since this is before the due date, it is my understanding that we cannot do that with dunning. What we are requesting can also be referred to as negative dunning. If an invoice is Net 60, we would like to send an email reminder to the account when the invoice is 15 days from net 60. So not due yet. Can you please help me locate instructions on how and where to set this up ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to send email reminders before the due date of th...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You may kindly follow the steps below to generate dunning letters for not-due items.

  1. Go to Business Configuration work center.
  2. Go to Activities, search for Dunning Strategies.
  3. Click edit dunning strategies.
  4. Check : Include items not overdue flag.

The dunning letter would calculate the Overdue Days based on the days remaining to reach the Due Date.

The process is also described in KBA below.

2498448 - Dunning Letter Shows Different Behavior in the Overdue Days for not Overdue Items

https://me.sap.com/notes/2498448

entry.title: Re: Problem with ATP check in production
entry.content: Have a look at the 'Availability Overview' for the component in the prod. order: CO02, component overview, select component, 'component availability check', 'ATP quantities'. Like CO09. Is kind of MD04 from ATP point of view. Intended to help you understand the ATP situation. Attaching the 'Availability Overview' screen might help to  get more input from the community.

entry.title: Re: Clear open items in the Public Cloud from the Private...
entry.content:
Hello JP,

Thank you for your question.

After talking to the experts, I can provide the following answer: The feature you mentioned is neither available nor planned to be available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

You may request features on the Customer Influence Portal. We continuously review and prioritize feature requests based on customer feedback. 

Kind regards,

Anne

entry.title: Customized theme display UI not correct in the search help
entry.content:
Dear exports,

I am working on the customized theme designer, and create a new theme based on the sap_fiori_3. The search help work as expected in the theme designer preview, but the UI input controls display chaos when I open the real FPM application link.

I am sure I didn`t modify any CSS after created the new theme, it looks like only the standard theme works correctly, my custmized theme based on sap_belize, sap_horizon,sap_fiori_3 all of them have the same issues.

When I put the cusor on the company code input controll and click down， it`s strange that the controls moves and display on the top of the orignial postion, I cannot figure out why it happened. I also tried to compare between the standard CSS and cutomized CSS files, even it`s copyed from the standard CSS but they are not the same. 

The sap UI version is 758. It`s quite strange and I don`t know if you ever has the same issue. Please let me know if you have any idea or solutions, I will appreciate for anything your provide. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Streamlining Sustainability Reporting: Integrating SAP Green Ledger with SAP Group Reporting
entry.content: great blog and a fantastic integration story!

entry.title: SユーザにMFAが設定できない
entry.content:
BTPで認証に利用するSユーザに対し、多要素認証を設定したくMFAの指示に従いhttps://accounts.sap.comへアクセスし設定を行おうとしましたが、添付の通りパスワードリセット画面に遷移しサイトに記載のあるような画面は表示されません。設定方法をご教示ください。

また、下記の対応方法があればあれば合わせてご教示ください。

・管理者が各SユーザのMFA設定を有効化・無効化する方法

・管理者が各ユーザのMFA設定有無を確認する方法


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SユーザにMFAが設定できない
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

ご質問内容について以下インラインにて失礼いたします。

>BTPで認証に利用するSユーザに対し、多要素認証を設定したくMFAの指示に従いhttps://accounts.sap.comへアクセスし設定を行おうとしましたが、添付の通りパスワードリセット画面に遷移しサイトに記載のあるような画面は表示されません。設定方法をご教示ください。

＝＝＞大変恐れ入りますが、下記のKBAで記載されておりますように、
ユーザのMFA設定関連については、SAP IDS teamで専門的に対応しています。

KBA: 3053832 - How to contact SAP ID Service team for password and login assistance for SAP sites.
The SAP IDS team helps users with various password/login topics such as (but not limited to):

  • Multi-factor authentication (MFA)

このため、MFAについてご質問・サポートが必要な場合は、直接メールにて
SAP IDS team（sso@sap.com）へお問い合わせいただけますでしょうか。

＞・管理者が各SユーザのMFA設定を有効化・無効化する方法

＝＝＞現在の実装ではユーザ自身でのみMFAを有効化にすることができます。
残念ながら、管理者によってS-UserのMFA有効・無効化する方法はございません。

ご希望に沿った回答ができておらず大変申し訳ございません。

もし当該機能の追加をご希望される場合は、https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#にて
機能追加要求リクエストを提出していただくことをご検討いただけますでしょうか 

KBA：3156721 - How to give feedback or share ideas and requirements - SAP for Me

>・管理者が各ユーザのMFA設定有無を確認する方法

＝＝＞管理者権限ユーザでSAP for Me > ユーザ管理 にてユーザのMFA 設定有無をご確認いただけます。

詳細な確認方法について記載されているKBA をお送りいたしますので、
ご参考になれば幸いです。

3547171 - How administrators can view which S-users have already activated MFA - SAP for Me

SAPサポート
Judy

entry.title: Re: The Next Generation Intercompany Solution: Intercompany Matching & Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hi @RajeshGoyal, 

Regarding question 1: please look into the feature "temporary resolution": https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/7570a4b5e63c4103bf947b7b9454d1e1.html?version=2502.500 

Question 2: Are you using the "matching run" from Define Matching Methods? If the status remains in "Scheduled" for long, it might indicate your user doesn't have the authorization to initiate the matching run or release the job. You can check SM37 log or try "Schedule Matching Run Jobs" app.

Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning HUB
entry.content: I have the same issue and created a case on Jan 13 with the learning support team. It is now in Feb. I still do not have access.

entry.title: Re: Company Structure Configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

The marked positions are displayed twice because they belong to both the parent position and the department, hence the associations are displayed separately. This is expected behavior.

If you do not want child position to be shown under parent position, you can go to Company Structure Configuration-> find the company structure you want to modify->click on position and delete the child position under parent position.

If you want to keep the child position, then this behavior is expected. 

Hope this answers your question.

Best regards

Elsa Chen
Technical Support Engineer, PS People
SuccessFactors
SAP

entry.title: Re: Payment Wizard schedule
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked for Schedule a Payment Wizard Run the following:

1. the database is HANA.

2. Job service is setup for the Server and the database & is Running.

3. In Payment Wizard, the scheduling is done and date and time is defined.

Check the below blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/schedule-the-payment-wizard-run/ba-p/13419721

kr,

Jitin

Any advice would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Rollingup data for a Dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to rollup data in SAP Analytics cloud, based on complaint number, i have to concatenate the code values.

 I couldn't find the way to acheive this using Calculated Dimension, i tried writing the script, but no luck.Could someone please help me on how to acheive this.

 

ComplaintNoCodeProduct name
CN-1A01P1
CN-1E034P1
CN-1F15P1
CN-2A25J1
CN-2G07J1

Output should be like the below.

ComplaintNoCodeProduct name
CN-1A01;E034;F15P1
CN-2A25;G07J1

entry.title: Classes not showing in date order
entry.content:
I have a Learning item with 3 future classes, but they are not showing in an order that does not makes any sense? They should display in date order but aren't nor are they displaying is Class ID order. Now all is set to the right time zone and date format (Australia)

They are showing in this order:
11/04/2025 (11 April)
23/09/2025 (23 Sept)
08/07/2025 (8 July)

Ideally they should be in date order with the most recent first and older ones in date order. So, April, July then Sept. Can any one help me understand how the order works? If there is a setting in LMS Admin or at class level? Thanks in advance, searching on SAP Help and Community hasn't yielded any solutions.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Launchpad: Updates for Developers and Partners in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502 ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Exciting news for developers and partners working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502 ABAP Environment:

More launchpad-related object types are now supported in the ABAP development tools for Eclipse and a new Developer Guide for SAP Fiori Launchpad is available on the SAP Help Portal.   

Please note: If you are developing in the SAP BTP ABAP Environment, the same object types are available and you can refer to the developer guide UI Development | SAP Help Portal for more information.

1. New Developer Guide for SAP Fiori Launchpad in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition                                                         

The new Developer Guide | SAP Help Portal provides developers and partners with information on enabling and extending SAP Fiori applications for the SAP Fiori launchpad, allowing them to adapt SAP S/4HANA Cloud to meet unique business needs.

It covers various adaptation options, from simple tweaks to creating new apps if necessary:

  • Personalization: Business users can personalize their SAP Fiori launchpad and their apps, such as changing display columns in a table and adapting filter bars.  

  • Key User Adaptation: Allows key users and developers to easily make common changes and make the adapted apps available to all users.  
    With key user adaptation, it’s possible to rearrange fields, change field labels, add fields or simple logic, hide existing fields and features, or embed external content, such as maps.
    Unlike personalization, changes made through key user adaptation apply to all app users. Additionally, you can publish UI changes as a separate app, known as an app variant, making it available to others.

  • Developer Adaptation: For more complex changes, developers can use SAPUI5 flexibility to adapt SAPUI5 freestyle or SAP Fiori elements apps to their company’s needs.
    With this modification-free approach, you don’t need to modify the source code of the original app. Instead, you use SAP’s development environment SAP Business Application Studio to create an Adaptation Project for the app that you want to change.
    An adaptation project behaves as follows – start as a preview, adapt using SAPUI5 adaptation project, and deploy from SAP Business Application Studio. The artifacts on an adaptation project represent only the changes that you make and not the entire application that you reuse.

  • Custom Apps: When needed, developers can create new SAP Fiori applications for OData services and make them accessible via the launchpad.

Check out the new Developer Guide | SAP Help Portal to get started!

2. New object types supported in the ABAP Development Tools

For an overview of the development process for custom apps, see SAP Fiori Applications in the ABAP Environment | SAP Help Portal .

Here is the news for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with release 2408 and 2502:

  • What's New 2502: Maintaining Launchpad App Descriptor Items: A launchpad app descriptor item describes how an application is started; it is required to bring newly developed apps into the SAP Fiori launchpad.
    In addition to the launchpad app descriptor items that are generated automatically from the manifest.json file during deployment, you can now also create and maintain launchpad app descriptor items manually in ABAP development tools for Eclipse. 
  • What's New 2408: Space and Page Templates: Customers and partners can now provide a predefined layout by creating launchpad space and page templates with the ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse. These templates can be used directly or serve as starting point for building custom spaces and pages for business roles.

Please note: Both object types are also available in the SAP BTP ABAP Environment, i.e. if you are not developing directly on-stack of your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system but in a side-by-side development scenario.

entry.title: Re: How to create your own ATC check in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello Olga,

Thanks for sharing this information with us. Could you please confirm if using the table type parameters is allowed in the meta data class?

As, we are trying to create a custom check with table type parameters in meta data class. It is working fine with Boolean and elementary type parameters, but getting below error while activating this custom check in the check variant( for table type parameters):



Created a table type parameter and defined the constructor of meta data class with table type parameter.

 



We have tried many different ways to make it work, but still failing.

So, please confirm if it is at all allowed or if you can share any hint how we can achieve this.

Thanks alot for you knowledge transfer always.

Regards

Nitin Goyal

entry.title: Product Replication from SAP ECC to SAP CPQ using BTP Integration Suite as middleware
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have an interface to replicate products from SAP ECC to SAP CPQ via SAP Integration Suite. Product data is sent from SAP ECC to the Integration Suite using DEBMAS IDocs. In Integration Suite, we make multiple calls to SAP CPQ’s custom API. Since SAP sends DEBMAS IDocs in bulk, many API calls to CPQ systems in Integration Suite are failing due to heavy traffic, resulting in incomplete product replication in SAP CPQ.

 

Is there a way to handle these message failures and ensure all products are successfully replicated?

Thanks,

Nilesh

entry.title: Business One Gateway API 404 Not Found Error
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use the Business One Gateway API to retrieve a list of reports that I can then download as a PDF.

The login request works and I get the following response:
{"Version":"0.0.1","SessionTimeout":30}
I am not passing in the optional DBInstance parameter if that makes any difference?

To confirm the login was working, if I change the username/password etc, I get the following response:

{ "code": -1, "message": { "lang": "en-us", "value": "Failed to login for current user, please double check and retry" }}
 
Once logged in successfully, any subsequent GET requests to the API gateway like  '/rs/v1/LoadAuthorizedCRList' just returns the following:

{"code":404,"message": "404 NOT_FOUND"}

If I try and call '/logout' I get the following:

{ "timestamp": "2025-02-05T04:41:25.127+00:00", "status": 400, "error": "Bad Request", "path": "/auth/oidc.logout" }

 

I am using SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 (64-bit) and I have confirmed the Job Server is setup. I am also in a Cloud Control Centre environment.

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Extract Document details using Document Information Extraction service with ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Renga,

You can use the following options and set the clientId to "default" before proceeding:

 

lv_options = '{ "schemaName": "SAP_invoice_schema", "schemaVersion": "1", "clientId": "default", "documentType": "invoice", "templateId": "detect" }'.

Then, configure the header and set the data accordingly:

 

part2->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Disposition', value = |form-data; name="options"; type=application/json| ). part2->set_cdata( EXPORTING data = lv_options ).

Give it a try.

Best Regards,
Arabath Iman

entry.title: Restricting parallel updates for superuser
entry.content:
I need a validation like:
As per SAP policy, super users can login in 2 different systems parallelly. I have 5 database like: DB1, DB2, DB3, DB4 and DB5.

If I login with the MANAGER user and my client IP/system ID like i.e. [255.255.255.255/ABC-SERVER] and another person also login with the same user id (i.e. MANAGER) in different client IP/system ID like i.e. [0.0.0.0/BCD-SERVER].

Need to validation:
1. when login in DB1 and I update any documents using my system(i.e. 255.255.255.255/ABC-SERVER) with any user id then I don't need any restrictions but when another system through login with same user ID (i.e. MANAGER) then validation should be work like "You are not authorized to update any documents".

2. when login with same user id, different systems or same system and database have different then validation should not work. if database is same, user id same and systems are different then validation should be work.

Additionally, I login with any user id then we can't identify the which users are logged-in which databases. This kind of flags are not available in SAP B1 Table structure as per my knowledge. If anyone have any alternate solution please help me I need query for which users are logged-in which database.

I need the solution for SAP B1 HANA.

entry.title: Utilising Third-Party OAuth Tokens in SAP API Management
entry.content:
Introduction

 

OAuth, a widely accepted standard for secure access delegation, allows applications to access resources securely without needing to expose user credentials.
SAP API Management integrates smoothly with third-party OAuth providers, enhancing flexibility and simplifying authentication processes.
This blog explores the process of importing externally generated access tokens, refresh tokens, or authorization codes into the SAP API Management token store.
 

Background

SAP API Management generates an access token by creating a random string of letters and numbers. This token is then associated with other data such as the issuance time, expiration time, the list of API products the token is valid for, and the scope. When the OAuthV2 policy is configured with Operation = GenerateAccessToken, SAP API Management automatically includes this information in the response:

 

{
  "issued_at": "1469735625687",
  "application_name": "06947s70-288e-4ca3-ac72-036723t15789",
  "scope": "urn:httpsbin.org/read",
  "status": "approved",
  "api_product_list": "[OauthProd]",
  "api_product_list_json": ["OauthProd"],
  "expires_in": "1799", //--in seconds
  "developer.email": "aa@sap.com",
  "token_type": "BearerToken",
  "client_id": "U9AC66e9YFyI1yqaXgUF8H6b9wUN1TLk",
  "access_token": "zBC90HhCGmGlaMBWeZAai2s5tfIog",
  "organization_name": "SAP",
  "refresh_token_expires_in": "0", //--in seconds
  "refresh_count": "0"
}

 

The value of the access_token attribute is effectively the lookup key for the response data. For example, if an application sends a request to an API proxy hosted on SAP API Management with the bearer token zBC90HhCGmGlaMBWeZAai2s5tfIog, the OAuthV2 policy configured with Operation = VerifyAccessToken will look up the token, retrieve all information, and validate whether the token is authorized for the requested API proxy. This process is known as token validation. Essentially, the access token is a reference to the underlying information that comprises the token.

Alternatively, you can configure SAP API Management to use tokens generated by an external system. For instance, if an external service generates tokens in the format TOKEN-<16 random numbers>, SAP API Management can store and associate the same Information(e.g., issuance time, expiration time, API product list) with these tokens. For example, the Information for a token TOKEN-1092837373654221 might be stored in SAP API Management, allowing it to validate the token using the OAuthV2 policy with Operation = VerifyAccessToken.

This approach also applies to importing other types of tokens, such as authorization codes or refresh tokens, into SAP API Management for validation and management.

 

Policy Flow for third-party OAuth on SAP API Management

 
In SAP API Management, client credentials are essential for authenticating and authorizing API consumers within an OAuth framework.When integrating with third-party OAuth systems for token generation, the process should follow one of the  following pattern :
  • External validation of client credentials
  • Internal validation of client credentials.
 

Policy configuration for External Validation of Client Credentials

  • ServiceCallout to Verify the inbound client credentials, and acquire an external token.

 

	<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
	<ServiceCallout async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	    <Request>
	        <Set>
	            <Headers>
	                <Header name="Authorization">{Variable holding Autorization value}</Header>
	                <Header name="Content-Type">application/x-www-form-urlencoded</Header>
	            </Headers>
	            <Verb>POST</Verb>
	        </Set>
	    </Request>
	    <Response>TokenResponse</Response>
	    <Timeout>30000</Timeout>
	    <HTTPTargetConnection>
	    <URL>URI that will generate oauth token (e. g https://<Hostname>/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials)</URL>
	    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

 

  • ExtractVariables  to extract the externally-generated token from the response.

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <JSONPayload>
        <Variable name="external_access_token" type="string">
            <JSONPath>$.access_token</JSONPath>
        </Variable>
    </JSONPayload>
    <Source>TokenResponse</Source>
</ExtractVariables>

 

  • AssignMessage to set the variable called oauth_external_authorization_status. The value must be true to indicate the client credentials are valid. In this policy, ClientID is also set .

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Set>
        <FormParams>
            <FormParam name="client_id">XXXXXXXXXXX</FormParam>
            <FormParam name="grant_type">client_credentials</FormParam>
        </FormParams>
    </Set>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>oauth_external_authorization_status</Name>
        <Value>true</Value>
    </AssignVariable>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="request"></AssignTo>
</AssignMessage>

 

  • OAuthV2/GenerateAccessToken with the <ExternalAuthorization> element set to true, and at least one of <ExternalAccessToken>, <ExternalRefreshToken>, or <ExternalAuthorizationCode>

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <ExternalAccessToken>external_access_token</ExternalAccessToken>
    <ExternalAuthorization>true</ExternalAuthorization>
    <Operation>GenerateAccessToken</Operation>
    <GenerateResponse enabled="true"/>
    <StoreToken>true</StoreToken>
    <SupportedGrantTypes>
        <GrantType>client_credentials</GrantType>
    </SupportedGrantTypes>
</OAuthV2>

 

 

Policy Configuration for Internal Validation of Client Credentials

  • ServiceCallout to acquire an external token.

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ServiceCallout async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Request>
        <Set>
            <Headers>
                <Header name="Authorization">{Variable holding Autorization value}</Header>
                <Header name="Content-Type">application/x-www-form-urlencoded</Header>
            </Headers>
            <Verb>POST</Verb>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>TokenResponse</Response>
    <Timeout>30000</Timeout>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
    <URL>URI that will generate oauth token (e. g https://<Hostname>/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials)</URL>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

 

  • ExtractVariables  to extract the externally-generated token from the response.

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <JSONPayload>
        <Variable name="external_access_token" type="string">
            <JSONPath>$.access_token</JSONPath>
        </Variable>
    </JSONPayload>
    <Source>TokenResponse</Source>
</ExtractVariables>

 

  • AssignMessage to set the Client-id and Client secret.

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Set>
        <FormParams>
            <FormParam name="client_id">XXXXXXXXXXX</FormParam>
            <FormParam name="client_secret">XXXXXXX</FormParam>
            <FormParam name="grant_type">client_credentials</FormParam>
        </FormParams>
    </Set>
     <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="request"></AssignTo>
</AssignMessage>

 

  • OAuthV2/GenerateAccessToken with the <ExternalAuthorization> element set to false, and at least one of <ExternalAccessToken>, <ExternalRefreshToken>, or <ExternalAuthorizationCode>

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <ExternalAccessToken>external_access_token</ExternalAccessToken>
    <ExternalAuthorization>false</ExternalAuthorization>
    <Operation>GenerateAccessToken</Operation>
    <GenerateResponse enabled="true"/>
    <StoreToken>true</StoreToken>
    <SupportedGrantTypes>
        <GrantType>client_credentials</GrantType>
    </SupportedGrantTypes>
</OAuthV2>

 

 

SAP Help Document Links : 

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-api-management/sap-api-management/third-party-oauth-token-usage?version=Cloud

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-api-management/sap-api-management/oauth-v2-0?version=Cloud

entry.title: SAP Fiori for Android and iOS 24.12 – New Enhancements and Branching for Design Kits
entry.content:
Wrapping up 2024 and starting into 2025, we keep continuously refining and advancing our mobile design system to empower mobile business app creation at scale. Thanks to insightful feedback from app teams, we've updated existing UI components and rolled out new ones to take mobile app experiences to the next level. We've also aimed for feature parity between SAP Fiori for Android and iOS to ensure a seamless experience and simplified application development across the platforms.

New Design Kits on Figma Community

The Figma Design Kits for Android, iOS, WatchOS and Wear OS are now available on the Figma Community. We’ve also improved the kits providing a better user experience, added more helpful information, and fixed bugs to make designing enterprise apps smoother than ever.


SAP Fiori Design Kits available on Figma Community

In our new Design Kits, your can find comprehensive information cards that provides details on usage, technical names, updates, and the component description now links directly to the SAP Design Guidelines. Besides this, we have Improved component properties, providing a more structured layout and consistent naming along Variables for styles - to include color modes, accent colors, semantic colors, and icon sizes.

You can find the latest SAP Design Kits on Figma.com/community

Introducing Branching Approach in Design Kit

No more creating new design kit versions – from release 24.12 onwards, our Design Kit is updated through a Figma branch, making it easier to update and maintain the library. Simply click on "See all branches" to view details about each update.

 

 

 


Design Kit Versioning with Branches

Major updates to the Design Kit and SDK are identified by release numbers such as 24.12 and include an overview of the updated components. Minor updates, identified by release numbers such as 24.12.1, include bug fixes as well as an overview of the affected components.

New in SAP Fiori for Android 24.12

Check out the latest UI enhancements and additions that our team has been working on for this release.

Avatars

The avatar component that is used to display user profiles, initials, placeholders, icons, or business-related images can now be used in an avatar group with an optional label.

See Avatars to find out more.


Avatar and avatar group variations on compact (left) and expanded screens (right)

Document Scanner

The document scanner leverages Google’s ML Kit, allowing users to digitize physical documents with an on-device flow. Users can select automatic or manual capture and easily edit, retake, or delete specific or all scanned documents. 

For more information, check out the Document Scanner article in the SAP Fiori for Android Design Guidelines.


Document scanner using Google’s ML Kit

Loading State Button

The loading state button is a new button variant featuring a circular progress indicator that appears inside a button when a user-triggered, non-disruptive progress is being processed. It supports various layouts, including a left-aligned button, right-aligned button, two opposite buttons, and text only, with flexible positioning to adapt to different use cases.

See Loading State Button for more details.


From top to bottom: contained loading state button, tonal loading state button, text and icon loading state button

Object Cell

The object cell has been enhanced to provide a more flexible object cell structure and supports nested components such as the rating control and KPI. On top of that, nested components can be easily swapped as needed.

Refer to Object Cell for more details.


Object cells with single actions on the right

Section Header/Footer

The section header can now also be used as a section footer. It supports various layouts, including a left-aligned button, right-aligned button, two opposite buttons, and text only, with flexible positioning to adapt to different use cases. 

Find out more about the Section Footer. 


Section footer with left-aligned button and header (top) and right-aligned button and header (bottom)

Chip Form Cell

The chip form cell has been enhanced with a mandatory field indicator (*) that can be placed next to the label above the chip.

See Chips to learn more about this component.


Single selection chips

Attachment Form Cell

The attachment form cell also supports adding a mandatory field indicator as well as a helper text and an error state.

Check out the Attachent Form Cell article to learn more. 


Attachment form cell as a mandatory field before validation (left) and after validation in error state (right)

Date and Range Picker

The date and range pickers are dialogs used to select a single date or a range of dates. For view-based picker dialogs, it is now possible to add a disabled state for dates and ranges,  minimum/maximum selectable dates, and status indicator decorations for dates.


Selecting a range in the range picker

For more information, refer to Date & Time Pickers.

New in SAP Fiori for iOS 24.12

Next, let’s check out the SAP Fiori for iOS enhancements and additions.

Avatar/Avatar Group

The avatar/avatar group is a new standalone component that is customizable in terms of size, shape, color, and layout. 

See Avatars and Images to find out more.


Examples of Avatars and Profile Images

Document Scanner

The new document scanner leverages Apple’s VisionKit, allowing users to digitize physical documents with an on-device flow. Users can select automatic or manual capture and easily edit, retake, or delete specific or all scanned documents. 

Refer to Document Scanner for more details.


Document scanner

Object Cell

The object cell has been enhanced to provide more flexibility, which mirrors the modular structure of the card component including swappable nested elements such as the rating control. 

Check out the Object Cell guideline article for more details.


Object cell single action variation

Form Cells

The form cell components have been updated with the option to add an asterisk to indicate mandatory fields.

See Attachment Form Cell, Filter Form Cell, Segmented Control Form Cell


Form cells with mandatory field indicator

Rating Control

The rating control now includes the option to display half stars for read-only ratings. You can also add optional leading and trailing text, and users benefit from improved accessibility features.

For more information, check out the Rating Control article in the SAP Fiori for iOS guidelines.


Rating control with label

Step Progress Indicator

The step progress indicator is a progress indicator for tracking and displaying a user’s state in a user flow. With the latest update, you can now choose to use icon nodes as an alternative to numeric and alphabetical nodes.

See Step Progress Indicator for more information.


Step progress indicator on compact (left) and expanded screens (right)

Multi-Message Handling

When a screen contains multiple messages, the banner can show an overview of the type and number of messages with an action link to open a multi-message handling detail view. In the multi-message detail view, it is possible to: filter for a specific message type, clear a single message or all messages of one type, and navigate to the location of the cell with the link.

For further details, see Multi-Message Handling.


Multi-message handling detail view on compact screen (left) and regular screen (right)

Resources

Design Guidelines


SAP Fiori Mobile Design Guidelines for Android and iOS

A detailed documentation on component anatomy, behavior, and interactions allows you to use components that match your use case. Crosslinks to Google’s Material Design Guidelines for Android and Apple’s Human Interface Guidelines for iOS, as well as links to development documentation, help you navigate to these resources. Additionally, you can find a feedback function on each guideline article that allows you to provide feedback.

SAP Fiori for Android Design Guidelines | SAP Fiori for iOS Design Guidelines

Design Kits for Figma


SAP Fiori for Android and iOS Design Kit

With the updated SAP Fiori for Android and iOS Design Kits, it’s now easier than ever to use the latest components and patterns in your mobile design. By using the Design Kits, you can quickly create a consistent user experience that enables app implementations at scale.

SAP Fiori for Android 24.12 Design Kits | SAP Fiori for iOS 24.12 Design Kits

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Output Management: Form Developments Common Challenges and Quick Hacks

If the option side by side extensibility, then is it possible to use Output Parameter determination app to control the form execution?

Hi @TomWoelfel , you can split 5 Qty into 3 & 2 into Warehouse Insection & Release CMR for both only things keep Reason of Rejection for 2 Qty.

system will Generate Credit memo document two line items

1st Line item Qty 3 ready for Invoice 

2nd line item Qty 2 it will on Rejection can't Invoice.

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩

entry.title: BYD2411 Need Accouting Support
entry.content:
Hello,
We sold a vehicle categorized as fixed asset with a PO $27,999.97. The FA number is 148-0, individual material number DIGITS. The payoff balance on the vehicle was $23,466.81. The buyer (California Dealer Exchange) issued 2 checks: 1 check directly to Ford Motors $23,466.81 and 1 check to Landi Renzo $4,533.16. So we sold the vehicle with a gain.

I can issue an invoice for the $4,533.16, but I am having a hard time how to account the payment issued to Ford Motors directly by the buyer: California Dealer Exchange. I need to zero out the fixed asset in SAP for this vehicle.



Thank you.

Merylou


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2411 Need Accouting Support
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out regarding the retirement of a fixed asset and the associated split payments. Here’s how to account for this transaction in SAP Business ByDesign to ensure the fixed asset is fully retired and the financial records are accurately reflected.

1. Retirement of the Fixed Asset

Start by creating a Retirement Document in SAP Business ByDesign to remove the asset from the books. This document should reflect the total book value of the asset.

  • Navigate to Fixed Assets → Fixed Asset Management → Fixed Asset Master Data, locate the asset, and initiate the retirement process.
  • Select the appropriate retirement type and ensure the full book value is included.

2. Issuing a Customer Invoice for the Direct Payment Received

If part of the payment was received directly from the buyer (representing a gain or sale proceeds), create a Customer Invoice to reflect this amount.

  • Go to Customer Invoicing → New Invoice and issue the invoice to the relevant customer.
  • This will ensure the revenue from the sale is properly recorded in the financial statements.

3. Accounting for the Payment Made Directly to a Third Party

If the buyer made a payment directly to a third party (e.g., a lender or supplier) to settle an outstanding balance, this needs to be accounted for without affecting the company’s bank accounts, while still clearing the corresponding liability.

Approach:

  • Create a Manual Journal Entry in the General Ledger Work Center:
    • Debit: A liability or clearing account to represent the payoff of the outstanding balance.
    • Credit: The fixed asset account or an asset clearing account to reduce the book value of the asset.

This approach ensures the asset’s value is cleared correctly, even though the payment did not go through the company’s accounts.

4. Final Reconciliation

After completing these steps:

  • The fixed asset will show a zero book value in SAP Business ByDesign.
  • The revenue from the sale will be properly recorded.
  • The direct payment to the third party will be accounted for, ensuring both the asset and any related liabilities are cleared.

Please let me know if you need further guidance on any of these steps or if you'd like to schedule a session to review the process in detail.

Best regards,
Pooja

entry.title: Re: Upload Prices in Sales from template-based spreadsheet
entry.content: if the new fields not show in template, please make sure the custom field enabled in template as below figure showed. If also have problem, could create an incident for providing more detail and we will check what's happened.

Thanks

entry.title: CDS view to link Supplier Invoice and corresponding accounting document
entry.content:
As we are developing PR to Payment report.
Here we want to fetch payment data with respect to supplier invoice.
We got CDS view to link Invoice accounting document and payment document(Clearing Document)
But, unable to find CDS view to link Supplier Invoice  to Accounting document
Please let us know , CDS view to link Supplier invoice to accounting document
Please help us in this regard


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDS view to link Supplier Invoice and corresponding a...
entry.content:
If you want to display journal entries for a supplier invoice, you can use the view I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 using the view I_JournalEntry. Please refer to this online documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/9d726dde11a445f29cb5b705ec6433d4.html?state=DRAFT&q=CDS%20view#example

For  more information, please kindly refer to the below URL:

Supplier Invoice | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SO-DR-SI upload through DTW

Thanks for the info. It work I just make AR invoice first and after uploading without an errors document is linked in DR. 

 

 

Regards,

Regards,

Renga

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩

entry.title: Authentication error when select system in adaptation project configuration
entry.content:
Hello, Experts

When I create the SAPUI5 Adaptation project, I got the Authentication error: Request failed with status code 401

1. I checked my SAP system setting, it's working fine for connection of SAP backend system.

2. I kept the versions of node.js and @SAP/generator-adaptation-project up to date.

3. I used the account from my colleague who has no issue to setup the system. And it still causes 401 issue.

 

Does anyone can help me with this issue?

entry.title: Re: Configuring Embedded SAC in SAP Sales and SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello @cianbarrett .

I am curious about something.

In this article, to activate eSAC in Sales Cloud V2, we used SAP IAS to make a SSO between Sales Cloud V2 / eSAC / BTP.

As I understand, all the business users in Sales Cloud V2 must be added to SAP IAS to have access/to use eSAC.

However, I think this is an inefficient way to manage users.

We handle user's authorization in Sales Cloud V2's Business Role settings, and add users in Sales Cloud V2's user settings.

However, by this method, when I need to open an authorization to use eSAC in Sales Cloud V2 tenant, I need to add the user information in Sales Cloud V2 and SAP IAS two-way.

Tell me if I am understanding the method of this SSO integration in a right way or not.

Sincerely,
JG_LEE

entry.title: Re: Call web service error queryA ENOTFOUND
entry.content: Can you publish the complete error from SAP Build Process Automation, and perhaps from Developer Tools?

entry.title: Re: Cannot fetch records in the data variable using a odata service in SAP Build Apps.

entry.title: Upgrade CRM 7.0 to 7.5 EHP 4
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Just wanted to reach out to everyone to ask if anyone is considering an upgrade from CRM 7.0 EHP0 to EHP4 on NW 7.5?

Would like to understand if anyone has done any analysis on this, pros/cons, known issues, considerations and challenges for integration with ECC 6.4 and SAP S4HANA ?

Thank in advance,

entry.title: BYD2411 Process prior month bank statement in the next month
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

Is there a way to process/ post the prior month bank statement in the following month?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2411 Process prior month bank statement in the nex...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

Thank you for your query.

Yes, it is possible to process or post a prior month’s bank statement in the following month in SAP Business ByDesign. Here’s a brief overview:

  • If the prior month’s accounting period is open, you can post the bank statement with the original posting date.
  • If the prior period is closed, you can still post the bank statement in the current month using the actual transaction date as the value date while the posting date reflects the current period.
  • This approach ensures accurate reporting in both financials and liquidity management.

Please let me know if you need further guidance on the specific steps.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Add n number of days to a date field in Compensation
entry.content: Thats right Xavier, i am trying to calculate a new date (existing date field + "N" of days) and show in the compensation worksheet. Alright, Thanks !!

entry.title: RAP - Root page action button, with single selection row causes child page to open issue ?
entry.content:
Hi Product and Topic Expert,

I have issue with action button. I have a list report with root and child page and my root page has one action button ( name is : "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" ).

When I select single row and push action button "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" , that causes child page to open issue.

But, when I select multi row and push action button "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" , that work fine and I am on the sama page. It will not be navigate to child page.

I need to your help out for issue...

Regarding this issue screenshots are down below..:

When select single row, push action button "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" ...

That causes child page to open issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - SAP Community Escape House - UI5

entry.title: Capacity Planning
entry.content:
Hi Experts, how can I optimize capacity planning to avoid overloads and improve production efficiency? I'm trying to configure work center capacities and adjust shift patterns to balance workloads while ensuring on-time production orders.

Regards,

Dafina

entry.title: Re: MIRO - Permitir alfanumérico na referência (RBKP-XBLNR)
entry.content:
You could set a breakpoint and look for implicit enhancement (or reverse code to find customisation) in function groups J1BB2 and J1BC.

  • Form CHECK_NFENUM_NUMERIC (include LJ1BB2F0D)
  • Function module J_1B_NF_NUMBER_SEPARATE

But be careful not to mess with Nota Fiscal System...

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in January
entry.content:
💥What a great start into 2025 💥
We continued to add lots of new features and enhancements to extend existing features with our two January releases. Explore the latest updates in our community news blogs and enjoy watching my top feature highlights for 2024 on YouTube below.

 

My top features in January

Transformation Flows

Enable generation of PlanViz & run simulation

There are two new options available in the monitoring for transformation flows via the data integration monitor:

  • Simulate a run that doesn't save changes in the target table by clicking “Simulate Run”. Simulating allows you to test a transformation flow and see if you get the desired outcome. Based on the result, you can decide to deploy the flow, resolve errors, or to optimize the flow to improve performances.
  • Download a PLV file of a visual map of the operators and their relationships and hierarchies by clicking ”Generate a SQL Analyzer Plan File”. The plan file contains detailed information about your data model that you can download for further analysis. Analyzing this file allows you to resolve errors and enhance the transformation flow performances.

More information

Python Operator with Spark runtime

You can insert a Python operator to transform incoming data with a Python script and output structured data to the next operator with the new Python operator for file based spaces sitting on the object store persistency. The Python script operator is available for code-based transformations leveraging the built-in Python libraries as well as NumPy and Pandas.

 

Replication Flow

Skip target columns that don't exist in the source

If you are using an existing table as the target for your replication flow, this table may contain columns that don't exist in the corresponding source object. Previously, you'd have to remove each of these columns manually in the table editor before you could start you replication flow. Now you can choose to ignore these columns during the replication. More information.

Import and Export

The export of replications flows to a CSN/JSON file (and also the import from that file) is now supported from the data builder editors like you know it from other design time artifacts.

 

SAP Business AI

SAP Business AI Activation Screen & User Authorizations

There is a new global role “DW AI Consumer” which enables the users assigned to it to use SAP Business AI features provided by SAP Datasphere. As a perquisite you require an entitlement for SAP AI Units and the AI features need to be activated in your SAP Datasphere tenant on the new “Configuration - AI Services” tab. For more details, please check SAP Note 3522010. 
Standard Roles Delivered with SAP Datasphere and Enable SAP Business AI and Joule for SAP Datasphere

Use SAP Business AI features to Enrich Catalog Assets

We already delivered the first AI feature in the catalog of SAP Datasphere. When enriching catalog assets on the asset details page, use the SAP Business AI features for adding custom summary and custom long descriptions and assigning tag relationships.

More information

  • Enriching, Classifying, and Publishing
  • Enriching and Managing Catalog Assets
  • Manage Hierarchies and Tags
  • Manage Tag Relationships for Assets

 

License-specific data selection for data products

You can now define the scope of a license by enabling scope changes, and specifying which data product content users can access without the need to create separated data products for the different licenses. 
More information.

 

 

SAP Business Unleashed Event

Join the virtual SAP Business Unleashed event on 📍February 13, 2025 to learn how to integrate and optimize every part of your business, witness the launch of a brand-new solution that connects and harmonizes all your data and explore how Joule, our copilot, deploys AI agents across your organization.
👉Register Now

 

My top blogs in January

The blog by @abange explains details about phase IV of the SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology covering topics like data governance, roles, organizational aspects, as well as the architecture roadmap planning tool. Keep on adding valuable content like this Alex!
➡️  Details of SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology Phase IV (Data Governance & Roadmaps)

 

The next two blogs by my friend @IngoH looking into simple drill down options for charts and tables in SAP Analytics Cloud on data in SAP Datasphere leveraging custom widgets a configuration tables. 
➡️  SAP Analytics Cloud & SAP Datasphere Combined to the rescue.... (Drill Down in SAP Analytics Cloud)
➡️  SAP Analytics Cloud & SAP Datasphere Combined to the rescue.... (Drill Down - Part 2)

 

More blogs to check out 👇

  • Details of SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology Phase IV (Data Governance & Roadmaps)
  • Minimum Viable Product with Seamless Planning
  • SAP BW/4HANA: The Grey Panther of Data Warehousing
  • Expired Tablets? Not on our Watch!Linking and Tracing value KPI to process PPI to DQ/Analytic/AI KPI
  • Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI
  • How to migrate data from SAP BW to SAP Datasphere BW bridge or SAP BW/4HANA using the Expert View
  • Boosting Performance in SAP Analytics Cloud: Simple and Efficient Strategies
  • New Cloud Connector IP ranges will be added January 19th 2025
  • Data Robot and SAP: Use Case Deep Dive
  • Light and Dark theme in SAP Analytics cloud (SAC)
  • Analyzing views, persisting and partitioning data in SAP Datasphere
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter January 2025
  • Deployment Readiness: SAP Datasphere & SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Analytics Cloud & SAP Datasphere Combined to the rescue.... (Drill Down - Part 2)
  • SAP Analytics Cloud & SAP Datasphere Combined to the rescue.... (Drill Down in SAP Analytics Cloud)
  • Lambda Architecture Implementation Using SAP Datasphere
  • Perform Percentage Calculations in SAP Datasphere

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting. Also check out the new support content for SAP Datasphere on SAP Help for troubleshooting and analysis guides, how-to guides, technical details, and more.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩
entry.content: Finally escaped!!

entry.title: Re: How to implement a custom entity in the ABAP RESTful Programming Model using remote function mod
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

I hope you’re doing well. I’d like to seek your expertise on a RAP-based API implementation I’ve developed in our on-premise S4 system. Here’s the context:

  1. Implementation Overview:

    • Created a custom RAP API for Asset Retirement using unmanaged behavior (root + child entities).

    • Wrapped the Check and Post BAPIs in a class, which is called via the RAP saver class.

    • Unmanaged behavior was chosen due to the absence of a persistent table for the custom entity.

  2. Current Flow:

    • Check logic: Executed in the check_before_save method of the RAP saver class. Failed/reported tables are updated here. Messages (success/error) are correctly returned in the response header.

    • Posting logic: Triggered in the save method. Messages (success/error) are correctly returned in the response header. Messages (success, because the method only has import parameter reported table) are correctly returned in the response header.

  3. Challenge:

    • The API works as expected, but I need to return the generated document number (e.g., DocumentNumber) in the response body of the custom entity.

  4. Attempted Solutions:

    • Later Numbering: Tried using adjust_numbers to update the mapped table, but the mapped table remains empty.

    • EML MODIFY ENTITIES ... IN LOCAL MODE: Tested in the save method, but it appears EML is unsupported for custom entities or conflicts with the save sequence. Tired to use READ ENTITIES for several methods of the saver class, all failed.

Have you encountered this scenario before? Is there a recommended approach to propagate the document number to the response body in this unmanaged custom entity setup? Any insights or alternative strategies would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Determination of payment terms in Condition Contract?
entry.content: Thank you very much for the detailed response, Victor. I will change the setting in the settlement process and test the behavior. Much appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Error : destination file error. [CrystalEnterprise.DiskUnmanaged]: [] when scheduling reports
entry.content: I am getting the exact same issue. Upon clicking on the above solution link it show no data. Can someone please help me in fixing the issue.

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE copy
entry.content:
Create the BAdI implementation and ask them to use the standard BAPI, giving them the structure name and data to pass to the EXTENSIONIN parameter.

Of course, you could create a Z-BAPI, but not as a copy of the standard. but as a wrapper of the standard BAPI to simplify their process (your Z-BAPI will map additional data to extensionin).

entry.title: Re: Enhancing RAP Performance : The Impact of Virtual Elements on Key Metrics
entry.content: Thankyou for this it help a lots to boost the knowledge

entry.title: Configuring the Remote ATC Central Check System in a S/4HANA consolidation/test system
entry.content:
Hello

I have a question for configuring Central ATC check system for our SAP S/4HANA 2023 systems.

First a bit of background for our requirement:

We have a dual S/4hana landscape one for Production Support(BAU changes) and one for Project Development work.
Our current dual S/4HANA landscape consist of the following:
BAU Dev(PSD) -> BAU Quality(PSQ) -> Pre-Prod(PRE) -> Production(PRD)
&
Project Dev(DEV) -> Project Quality(QAS) -> Pre-Prod(PRE) -> Production(PRD)

We have configured ChaRM with retrofit in our Solution Manager system 7.2 SP14.

We are looking into using enhanced retrofit s/4hana check for retrofitting changes from source system BAU Dev(PSD) on SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS00(lower release) into target system Project Dev(DEV) on SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01(higher release) as per the SAP Note 2504773 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2504773

Once of the prerequisite for retrofitting changes between systems on different release or support package level is to have a Central ATC system(ATC hub) configured and connect the Solution manager system to the ATC hub, see below sap help link for more information.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/afb05ae119a0408dada0200502a8d419.html?locale=en-US&version=7.2.14

So my question is whether can we use our existing Project Quality(QAS) system and configure it as an Central ATC system(ATC HUB) and connect both the development systems to ATC hub Project Quality(QAS) system and connect Solman to ATC hub and use the cross release checks for s/4hana for retrofitting?

We do not have a sandbox system in our landscape, so can we use our existing quality system as Central ATC system for this purpose?

@OlgaDolinskajaand @DoloresCorreayour views would be appreciated here. 

Thanks & Regards,

Sharyu

entry.title: Re: How to check your custom code for ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi 
It is a very good blog Thank you for sharing valuable information,
In my company using a custom namespace for the reports and class Eg /name/
when I try to ATC check with ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS

There are no Results can you help me?,
how to check ?
I observed that the ATC check only works For Z/Y objects, not Standard objects.

entry.title: Re: DRF Outbound Implementation 986_3, how to figure out...
entry.content:
Hi Zakir,

The receiving system should have this logic to identify whether its creation or change. The way it can be identified in your system by establishing some sort of key mapping where you store the 3rd party system BP details in your MDG system.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Blank page error is coming while going from one page to another page in SAP UI5 CAPM Project.
entry.content: I am created a CAPM project with UI5. When I select button to go to another page, I am getting a loading error. Why is this error coming and how to solve it?

entry.title: Re: Product Replication from SAP ECC to SAP CPQ using BTP...
entry.content:
@nileshnagane12 

 

Did you try new Product Rest API which has bulk update feature which can do in few multiple calls (100 records once) ?

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/introducing-sap-cpq-product-rest-api-available/ba-p/14003577
